violations.text: An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (chips) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Chips disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Milk was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit in the cold-hold unit, with an ambient of 45 degrees. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved milk to other refrigeration; PIC to request maintenance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
The door to the unisex toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
